## Notes for reviewers

CI runs `pnpm check`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm format:check`, `pnpm test`, and `pnpm build` on every push. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for setup and house style.
